ddls:
CREATE TABLE "graphs" (
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graph */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the graph */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of graph (directed or undirected) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the graph */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the graph was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the graph was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Whether the graph is publicly accessible or private */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the graph */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph the node belongs to */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label of the node */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the node */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the node */,
  "z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the node was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the node was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edges" (
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edge */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph the edge belongs to */,
  "node1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first node connected by the edge */,
  "node2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second node connected by the edge */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the edge */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the edge */,
  "edge_type" TEXT /* Type of the edge */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the edge was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the edge was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edges_node1_id FOREIGN KEY ("node1_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edges_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edges_node2_id FOREIGN KEY ("node2_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node the attribute belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the attribute */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the attribute value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the attribute was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the attribute was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_attributes_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edge_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the edge the attribute belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the attribute */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the attribute value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the attribute was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the attribute was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edge_attributes_edge_id FOREIGN KEY ("edge_id") REFERENCES edges ("edge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graph_algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph the algorithm was run on */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the algorithm result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the algorithm result was last updated */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the algorithm execution in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graph_algorithms_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the parameter belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_parameters_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES graph_algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the graph */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graph_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graph_versions_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_versions_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edge_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the edge being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edge_versions_edge_id FOREIGN KEY ("edge_id") REFERENCES edges ("edge_id")
)
